warnings: This is the 2nd-floor plan sheet (A-05, แปลนพื้นชั้น 2) — houses all 3 bedrooms (นอน1/นอน2/นอน3) plus WC.2 and the balcony/ระเบียง with guardrail, matching the cover page's stated '3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms' program (1 bathroom on each floor).

GRID-RELEVANT FOR หน้า00 MASTER (reporting only, master file not edited): top dimension chain reads left to right: 1.10 (west overhang, beyond grid1) | 3.50 (grid1-2) | 3.00 (grid2-3, sub-split 1.20+1.80) | 0.50 (east overhang, beyond grid3) — matches the master grid's x_lines and dummy grids 1'/3' exactly, same as the ground floor. Left dimension chain: 1.50 (north overhang) | 3.00 (E-D) | 2.20 (D-C) | 4.00 (C-B) | 1.50 (B-A) — matches y_lines E/D/C/B/A exactly. CASCADE_2026-07-19: dummy grids 1''(2.25)/A'(12.75)/A''(13.7) added to the master by user, cascaded here: (a) this sheet also prints '2.05' below gridA on the left chain (with a '0.25' sub-tick at the ระเบียง south wall line) ending at the outermost boundary line = A'(12.75), zoom-verified — 2nd sheet confirming A' after หน้า06; (b) 1'' = the stairwell/hall partition, mirrored from the ground floor (see โถง_upper flag); (c) A''(13.7) has NO corresponding feature on this sheet either — nothing drawn 3.0m south of gridA; source sheet for A'' still unidentified within pages 06/07, flagged.

The floor2 plan's grid2-3 x gridC-gridB bay is explicitly labeled 'แนวหลังคา' (roof line) — an open void over the ground-floor carport, not an enclosed room; the upper floor footprint is therefore smaller/different from the ground floor at this bay (ground floor has จอดรถ carport occupying that same grid cell as a covered-but-open space, upper floor has no floor slab there at all, just roof). This is exactly the kind of ground-vs-upper-floor footprint difference the task asked to flag — no enclosed 2nd-floor room sits directly above the carport.

IMPORTANT NAMING DISCREPANCY flagged for the grid-master owner / human review: this sheet's own stair callout reads 'ST.3 A-19' (referencing the same detail sheet A-19 as the ground floor's 'ST.2 A-19' callout). Sheet A-19's own title block calls both flights (floor1-to-landing AND landing-to-floor2) 'บันได ST.2'. This is very likely a single physical switchback (dog-leg) stair mislabeled ST.3 on this one callout rather than two separate stair marks — not resolved/corrected here, flagged as-is per both readings.
Levels: ±0.00 (reference) → +0.60 (floor 1) → +3.75 (floor 2) → +6.65 (roof beam level), cross-confirmed identically across every elevation/section sheet in this set (หน้า09-15).
